query:
SELECT mac.machine_id AS "machine_id!",
               mac.hostname   AS "hostname!",
               mac.last_seen  AS "last_seen!",
               lm.last_message_at
        FROM machines mac
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT machine_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_message_at
            FROM messages
            GROUP BY machine_id
        ) lm ON lm.machine_id = mac.machine_id
        ORDER BY mac.machine_id
